=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Olympiahalle
Innsbruck, Austria
23 April 2002

I have no info about this recording.
Great sound


1 intro, 2 Humming Bird (acoustic) (Larry on electric guitar), 3 Senor (Tales Of Yankee Power) (acoustic) (Bob on harp and Larry on cittern), 4 Desolation Row (acoustic), 5 My Back Pages (acoustic) (Bob on harp and Larry on fiddle), 6 Absolutely Sweet Marie (Larry on pedal steel), 7 Solid Rock, 8 Sugar Baby, 9 Highway 61 Revisited, 10 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic), 11 Fourth Time Around (acoustic) (Larry on cittern and Charlie on electric guitar), 12 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic),

CD2

1 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass), 2 I Believe In You, 3 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp), 4 Cat's In The Well, 5 Love Sick, 6 Like A Rolling Stone, 7 If Dogs Run Free (acoustic) (Larry and Charlie on electric guitars), 8 Honest With Me (Larry on slide guitar), 9 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 




Concert # 1415 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 14 of the 2002 Europe Spring Tour. 2002 concert # 32.

First concert with the 14th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Jim Keltner (drums & percussion).

1–4, 9-11, 18, 20 acoustic with the band.
2, 4, 14, 20 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
3, 10 Larry Campbell (cittern).
4 Larry Campbell (fiddle).

1, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

 

Note. First acoustic version of Seńor (Tales Of Yankee Power)!

 

15 new songs (75%) compared to previous concert. 3 new songs for this tour.
